programme.title: Tango Charlie
programme.desc: Tarun, a BSF officer, along with his battalion gets deployed to Kargil when a war between India and Pakistan breaks out. This is where Tarun faces the life-threatening challenge.

programme.title: Dum
programme.desc: When a diligent aspiring policeman named Uday realises that his superior is a corrupt man, he takes it upon himself to fight corruption, so even if it means putting at risk his life and his dream of becoming an officer.

programme.title: Halla Bol
programme.desc: An aspiring actor from a small town makes his way to the top of the coveted Hindi film industry and attains superstardom. However, his life changes drastically when he becomes the prime witness to a murder but is reluctant to reveal what he has seen.

programme.title: Bollywood Movie
programme.desc: The Movie Club provides Bollywood films, popular Indian movies, and general entertainment programming.
